reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar de paso y para cargar combustible.
El camping es para los socios asi que ni se te ocurra sentarte en ese predio (parque privado) por que la encargada de la oficina te hace abandonar el lugar cuando estas ya con el equipo de mate y las vituallas sobre la mesa. Una pena que por unos pocos minutos de usar una mesa de cemento hagan tanto alboroto. No me gustó la reacción de la sra. Ojala que alambre todo con alambrado de 2 metros de altura para que nadie pueda ingresar  a ese pequeño parque de descanso.
Cargue nafta y como cliente pensé que podía usar por un momento esa mesa para tomar unos mates. Nos sacaron carpiendo.....
Una lastima....no cargargare mas combustible en esa YPF concesionada al Automóvil CLUB ARGENTINO.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop and fill up.
The campground is for members only, so don't even think about sitting on that area (private park) because the woman in charge of the office will make you leave as soon as you have your mate set and food on the table. It's a shame that they make such a fuss over using a cement table for just a few minutes. I didn't like the woman's reaction. I hope they put up a 2-meter-high fence so no one can enter that little rest area.
I filled up with gas and, as a customer, I thought I could use that table for a moment to have some mate. They kicked us out...
What a shame... I won't be filling up at that YPF station, which is a concession to the Automóvil Club Argentino, anymore.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNHBYNW9BRRAB
